trust.reason: IDE-only convenience downloads, not consumed by the build itself
IDE-only convenience downloads, not consumed by the build itself
Gradle's own distribution sources, downloaded by the IDE for source navigation only, e.g. gradle-8.14.4-src.zip
Gradle's own bundled Groovy runtime, pulled in by IntelliJ's downloadLocalGroovySources for IDE source navigation only; the project has no real dependency on Groovy
